Non-binding Term Sheet for a proposed acquisition by Laguna Ridge Ventures, Inc. (LRV) of 60% of the outstanding shares of Sampaguita Foods, Corp. (SFC), a corporation organized under the laws of the Republic of the Philippines.
Parties and contact: LRV (acquirer) and SFC (target); data room and notices via dealroom@lagunaridge.ph and corporate.secretariat@sampaguitacorp.ph.
Purchase price and shares: 120,000,000 common shares at PHP 10.00 per share (aggregate PHP 1,200,000,000), subject to a completion accounts adjustment and an earn-out of up to PHP 150,000,000 tied to FY2027 EBITDA.
Structure and funding: 80% cash consideration at Closing and 20% placed in a 12‑month escrow; escrow to be held at Tamaraw Bank, Ltd., Current Account No. 031‑44**‑**19 under escrow reference “CARAMAY‑2026,” beneficiary LRV.
Conditions precedent: approvals and/or clearances from the Philippine Capital Markets Commission (PCMC) and the Republic Competition Authority (RCA) if applicable thresholds are met, target and acquirer board approvals, no material adverse change, external fairness opinion, and confirmatory due diligence on tax, HR, banking, and capital‑markets practices.
Disclosure and MNPI: until Closing or a required public statement under the Securities Regulation Code (e.g., Rule 17 report triggers), this document and all information herein constitute material non-public information and must not be traded upon; LRV and SFC will coordinate the timing and form of any market disclosure on the Manila Securities Exchange if listing or crossing is used.
Key employee retention: Mr. Joaquin A. Rivera (DOB 1990‑05‑12), Finance Manager of SFC in Ciudad Nueva (Office Site Code CN‑Tower2), will be offered a 24‑month retention bonus of PHP 1.8M; contact details and systems for transition include corporate email j.rivera@sampaguitacorp.ph, local line +63‑02‑445‑0911 ext. 232, laptop Asset Tag SFC‑LT‑0441 (Device ID SFC‑BIO‑7C2F‑E1A4), payroll current account at Tamaraw Bank No. 0079‑223‑884 (masked), internal HR ID SFC‑FIN‑019, and last deal‑room session reference CN‑5‑2026‑0521‑2110.
IT and access transition: upon Signing, SFC will whitelist LRV domains and implement a phased de‑provisioning of legacy credentials (user handle jrivera‑cn2; Wi‑Fi SSID SFC‑Guest‑5G; shared drive path \\CN‑T2‑FIN\Budget2026) to ensure continuity and auditability without exposing personal identifiers beyond the scope of the Data Privacy Act.
Tax and fees: parties will allocate documentary stamp tax, capital gains or withholding on secondary transfers (if any), and notarial and transfer fees per the National Internal Revenue Code and local ordinances; each party bears its own advisory fees.
Closing and settlement: target Closing is 31 August 2026, subject to CP satisfaction; settlement via T+2 if transacted through the Manila Securities Exchange’s negotiated crossing board or via over‑the‑counter share transfer if private, with share certificates and registry updates effected within five business days.
Interim covenants: from Signing to Closing, SFC will operate in the ordinary course, maintain existing banking facilities, refrain from extraordinary dividends, and provide monthly management accounts; LRV may nominate two observer seats to the SFC board without voting rights.
Confidentiality and data privacy: the parties will execute a separate NDA compliant with the Data Privacy Act; no government identification numbers, home addresses, or tax identification numbers will be requested or shared beyond what is strictly necessary for Closing.
Illustrative non-identifying data point: a 34‑year‑old manager based in Westport Zone using an iOS handset and a savings account ending 7710 is mentioned only for systems testing context and is not identified by name, employer, or role.
General: this term sheet is not intended to create binding obligations except as to confidentiality, exclusivity (90 days), governing law (laws of the Republic of the Philippines), and dispute resolution (sole arbitration seat in Ciudad Nueva).
Counsel and contacts: Atty. Mara S. Ilustre (external counsel to LRV), counsel.ilustre@lexbayan.ph; company secretary for SFC, Ms. Hara Quinco, corpsec@sampaguitacorp.ph; administrative hotline +63‑08‑777‑4200 (non‑emergency).
